title: Chewy Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Chewy exceeded guidance with strong Q1 2024 performance with net sales of $2.88 billion, up 3.1% year-over-year, exceeding the high end of guidance. Gross margin improved 130 basis points year-over-year to 29.7%. Adjusted EBITDA reached $163 million with 5.7% margin. Free cash flow generated $52.6 million. CEO Sumit Singh stated: Q1 net sales exceeded the high end of our guidance range, increasing by approximately 3% to $2.88 billion. The subscription program hit record levels at $2.2 billion in Autoship sales, representing 77.6% of total revenue and growing 6.4% year-over-year. For the first time since 2022, new customer acquisition and reactivation both exceeded expectations, with reactivation up mid-teens year-over-year. Net sales per active customer reached $562, reflecting 9.6% growth, driven by expanded wallet share and category expansion into healthcare. Chewy launched a beta paid membership program (Chewy Plus) offering free shipping, rewards, and exclusive perks. Veterinary clinics reached four locations with plans to reach the high end of the 4-8 clinic opening target for 2024. Sponsored ads business continues scaling, positioned to reach 1-3% of net sales long-term. The company authorized its first-ever share repurchase program of up to 500 million. 2024 guidance: $11.6-11.8 billion in net sales (4-6% growth), adjusted EBITDA margin of 4.1-4.3%, flat to slightly down active customers in first half with recovery in second half.
